svg.title: Positioning matrix: Family-facing vs Staff-facing (x-axis) and Real-time updates vs Scheduled/async (y-axis)
svg.desc: A 2x2 positioning matrix showing where five competitors sit relative to Connected's target position. Connected targets the top-right quadrant: highly family-facing with real-time updates. StoriiCare is close but more staff-centric. LifeLoop sits in the center-right. Others are more staff-facing and async.
